en: You are unable to see the truth

Game Laws:
1. Card effects are active when they are not covered. Card Stamps and Type are always active
2. There is an Upper Game Zone and a Lower Game Zone
3. There is a Draw Deck, its contents are shuffled at the Start of a Game
4, There is a Discard Deck, cards enter here after a Submission (mention order)
5. There is a Rules Deck, cards here are uncovered and therefore always active

Add Input Zone Card to the Upper Zone
Inactive: Remove Input Zone Card from Upper Zone

Add Input Zone Card to the Lower Zone
Inactive: Remove Input Zone Card from Lower Zone

The beginning of a Stack.
Next: If in Upper Zone, drop card to open space in Lower Zone. Then Draw a Card.

The beginning of a Stack. Cannot be moved. Allows Cards to be placed on top of itself.
Next: If in Upper Zone, drop card to open space in Lower Zone. Then Draw a Card.
Removed: Stacked cards are Discarded
On score: hoops equal to rank cross this row. Talents they pass jump through and score.
On score: knives equal to rank cross this row from the far side. Props they pass are scored; talents spin.
On score: balls equal to rank fly to talents down the column (mancala), leaving Juggling.
On score: fire equal to rank flies down the column (skipping talents and Fire), leaving Burning.
On score: fireworks equal to rank rise up the column and bank column score at the top.
This card's suit effect count is boosted by %d.
